# Expo Template — Examples Index

<!-- GENERATED FILE - do not edit. Rebuild with `bun run docs:llms`. -->

Fetchable raw URLs for this template's example and source files
(https://github.com/mrmeg/expo-template). Fetch a demo route to see components composed in a real screen,
then the matching screen template or component source for implementation
detail. Screen templates live in self-contained folders under
`client/templates/<name>/` (`Screen.tsx` + `demo.tsx` + `meta.ts`); the
`app/(main)/(demos)/screen-<name>.tsx` route re-exports the demo.

## Demo Routes (`app/(main)/(demos)/`)

Working in-app examples for every component and screen template; the best reference for real composition.

- app/(main)/(demos)/auth-demo.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/auth-demo.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/detail-hero.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/detail-hero.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/developer.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/developer.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/form-demo.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/form-demo.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/onboarding.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/onboarding.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/screen-card-grid.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/screen-card-grid.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/screen-chat.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/screen-chat.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/screen-dashboard.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/screen-dashboard.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/screen-error.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/screen-error.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/screen-form.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/screen-form.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/screen-list.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/screen-list.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/screen-notifications.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/screen-notifications.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/screen-pricing.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/screen-pricing.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/screen-profile.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/screen-profile.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/screen-search.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/screen-search.tsx

- app/(main)/(demos)/screen-welcome.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/screen-welcome.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/server-alpha.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/server-alpha.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/server-alpha/[example].tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/server-alpha/%5Bexample%5D.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/showcase/index.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/showcase/index.tsx
- app/(main)/(demos)/themed-showcase.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/(main)/(demos)/themed-showcase.tsx

## Screen Templates (`client/templates/`)

Self-contained template folders: Screen.tsx is the reusable, props-driven component (pass data/callbacks from a feature folder; no domain logic), demo.tsx is a worked example with sample data, meta.ts is registry metadata.

- client/templates/card-grid/Screen.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/templates/card-grid/Screen.tsx
- client/templates/card-grid/demo.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/templates/card-grid/demo.tsx
- client/templates/card-grid/meta.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/templates/card-grid/meta.ts
- client/templates/chat/Screen.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/templates/chat/Screen.tsx
- client/templates/chat/demo.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/templates/chat/demo.tsx
- client/templates/chat/meta.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/templates/chat/meta.ts
- client/templates/dashboard/Screen.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/templates/dashboard/Screen.tsx
- client/templates/dashboard/demo.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/templates/dashboard/demo.tsx
- client/templates/dashboard/meta.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/templates/dashboard/meta.ts

- client/templates/detail-hero/meta.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/templates/detail-hero/meta.ts

- client/templates/error/demo.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/templates/error/demo.tsx
- client/templates/error/meta.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/templates/error/meta.ts

## UI Component Source (`packages/ui/src/components/`)

Source of every @mrmeg/expo-ui component. Consumers import from the npm package, not these paths.

- packages/ui/src/components/Accordion.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/packages/ui/src/components/Accordion.tsx
- packages/ui/src/components/Alert.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/packages/ui/src/components/Alert.tsx
- packages/ui/src/components/AnimatedView.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/packages/ui/src/components/AnimatedView.tsx
- packages/ui/src/components/Badge.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/packages/ui/src/components/Badge.tsx
- packages/ui/src/components/BottomSheet.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/packages/ui/src/components/BottomSheet.tsx
- packages/ui/src/components/Button.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/packages/ui/src/components/Button.tsx
- packages/ui/src/components/Card.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/packages/ui/src/components/Card.tsx
- packages/ui/src/components/Checkbox.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/packages/ui/src/components/Checkbox.tsx
- packages/ui/src/components/Collapsible.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/packages/ui/src/components/Collapsible.tsx

## Form Wrappers (`client/lib/form/`)

react-hook-form + zod wrappers used by form screens and demos.

- client/lib/form/FormCheckbox.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/lib/form/FormCheckbox.tsx
- client/lib/form/FormMessage.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/lib/form/FormMessage.tsx
- client/lib/form/FormProvider.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/lib/form/FormProvider.tsx
- client/lib/form/FormSelect.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/lib/form/FormSelect.tsx
- client/lib/form/FormSwitch.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/lib/form/FormSwitch.tsx
- client/lib/form/FormTextInput.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/lib/form/FormTextInput.tsx
- client/lib/form/index.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/lib/form/index.ts
- client/lib/form/useFormField.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/lib/form/useFormField.ts

## Server Stack

Key files for replicating server output, API routes, loaders, and middleware. Read `docs/server-guide.md` first.

- app.config.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app.config.ts
- server.bun.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/server.bun.ts
- server/index.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/server/index.ts
- server/rateLimits.js: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/server/rateLimits.js
- app/+middleware.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/%2Bmiddleware.ts
- client/features/server-alpha/loaders.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/features/server-alpha/loaders.ts
- client/features/server-alpha/ServerAlphaDemoScreen.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/features/server-alpha/ServerAlphaDemoScreen.tsx
- client/features/server-alpha/ServerAlphaExampleScreen.tsx: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/features/server-alpha/ServerAlphaExampleScreen.tsx
- app/api/template/status+api.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/api/template/status%2Bapi.ts
- app/api/template/examples+api.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/api/template/examples%2Bapi.ts
- app/api/template/echo+api.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/app/api/template/echo%2Bapi.ts
- server/api/shared/cors.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/server/api/shared/cors.ts
- server/api/shared/errors.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/server/api/shared/errors.ts
- server/api/shared/auth.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/server/api/shared/auth.ts
- client/showcase/registry.ts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrmeg/expo-template/main/client/showcase/registry.ts
